channel.title: The Nero Show
channel.itunes:author: Chris Miller
channel.itunes:subtitle: Road Cycling’s Group Chat
channel.itunes:summary:
The NERO Show is a weekly video podcast that serves up unfiltered road‑cycling chat on YouTube and all major audio platforms. Hosts Chris Miller and professional cycling coach Jesse Coyle dive into breaking gear launches, performance science, training debates and the quirks of bunch‑ride culture, wrapping serious detail in a relaxed Australian tone. The show holds a 4.8‑star rating on Spotify with over 800 ratings and more than 150 episodes have aired since its launch in 2023, proof of a loyal global audience that keeps coming back for practical insight and a good laugh. 


Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: The Truth About Who Pays for Your Favourite Bike Race
item.itunes:title: The Truth About Who Pays for Your Favourite Bike Race
item.description:
👉🏼 Use JOIN Cycling’s training app to get faster. Get 1 month free, no credit card required at https://join.cc/neroshow


What is the current state of the climate change issue in 2026? What are the biggest contributors to this climate change? Climate change at the TDU, should we be concerned about Santos sponsorship, the good, the bad, the ugly. What about that  @gcntech  expect telling us to buy a bike every 15 years, do climate experts agree?


🛒 Get 15% off your first purchase with code "NERO" at https://pillarperformance.shop


🧦 Velotoze is the offical ride accessory partner of The Nero Show: Get 10% off with Code "NERO" at https://www.velotoze.com


📺 New Episodes of The Nero Show every week: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t


👔 Support the show by buying The NERO Skinsuit: https://nero-club.myshopify.com


💻 For business and advertising opportunities, email: partnerships@nero.bike


🐶 Email your Dog or Fast Bike entry to: info@nero.bike



Dave Morris Bio


Dave Morris is the CEO of climate and sport advocacy organisation FrontRunners, taking the reins from founding CEO Emma Pocock, after a decade with the Environmental Defenders Office (EDO).

As inaugural CEO of EDO Australia-Pasifik, Dave unified a network of legal offices into a single public interest legal centre which continues to serve the entire region. Under his leadership, EDO delivered landmark litigation and advanced the law on climate change, ecosystem protection and cultural heritage.

David has deep experience advising governments on environmental reforms and in 2016 received the Mahla Pearlman Award for Young Environmental Lawyer of the Year from the Law Council of Australia.

He is a former board member of the Australian Conservation Foundation and has held voluntary governance roles with Torquay Surf Lifesaving Club, and the Environment Centre Northern Territory. In 2022, David was awarded a scholarship to complete the McKinsey Executive Leadership Program.

Growing up playing cricket, Aussie rules, and deeply involved in the surf lifesaving community, Dave has a lifelong connection with sport, which currently lives on through his kids’ junior programs.


Frontrunners - https://www.protecttdu.au


Emeritus Professor Mark Howden AC FTSE FAA


Emeritus Professor Mark Howden is the former Director of the Institute for Climate, Energy & Disaster Solutions at The Australian National University.



Our Links:

NERO Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/neroshowcycling/

Chris Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chrismiller27/

Jesse Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jessecoyle/

Coaching Inquiries for Jesse: https://www.nero.club/coaching


Chapters

00:00 intro

00:45 Current State Of Climate Change

10:50 SANTOS and the TDU

27:41 Impacts Of Road Cycling on Climate

30:21 Individuals Role

35:00 Pressure On Energy Prices

42:00 Hurdles To Reduce Emissions

50:00 Climate Adaptation

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

Additional Footage

 ⁨@bikeradar⁩ 

 ⁨@GCPerformance18⁩ 

 ⁨@ScopecyclingOfficial⁩ 


The Tour de France is the world’s most prestigious and demanding cycling race, held annually each July. First staged in 1903, the race spans 21 stages over 23 days, covering approximately 3,500 kilometers across France and occasionally neighboring countries. It features a mix of flat stages, mountain climbs, time trials, and iconic summit finishes like Alpe d’Huez and Mont Ventoux.

Riders compete not just for individual stage wins but also for various classification jerseys: the yellow jersey (general classification leader), green jersey (points classification), polka-dot jersey (best climber), and white jersey (best young rider). The race is contested by the world’s top UCI WorldTeams, with elite riders supported by teammates who help control the race, protect the leader, and execute team strategy.


Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.itunes:title: Carbon Wheel Buying Guide: The Best & Worst Buys | NERO Show Ep. 109
item.description:
Today's Episode is powered by Peaks Challenge Falls Creek – Australia's most thrilling one-day cycling event! Sign up now for 2025: https://bicyclenetwork.com.au.


We bring in a guest to discuss the best carbon wheel sets on the market in 2024. It's a question we are always asked, so we wanted to look it when budget was no barrier.


Chris gets a top 10 result in an elite gravel race so Jesse breaks down his ride from a coaches perspective, and we look at what the reality of a gravel race is for a road cyclists.

item.title: Cyclist Tried The “Miracle” Fat Jab: Riding Is HARD On Ozempic | NERO Show Ep. 108
item.itunes:title: Cyclist Tried The “Miracle” Fat Jab: Riding Is HARD On Ozempic | NERO Show Ep. 108
item.description:
Today's Episode is powered by Peaks Challenge Falls Creek – Australia's most thrilling one-day cycling event! Sign up now for 2025: https://bicyclenetwork.com.au.


Does the miracle weight loss drug have any use in cycling, we talk to someone who has not only tried it, but trained and raced while using the drug.


What are the best Road helmets in 2024, we try to pick through the confusing aerodynamic data available. Spy photos of a new Ridley bike and we are on the ground with  @CyclingTom  at the 4th grand tour.


Articles Referenced:

https://velo.outsideonline.com/road/road-gear/7-road-helmets-aero-tested-which-one-was-fastest/

54:48 Spy Photos Of Ridley

item.title: ENVE Melee Review - A Smooth Race Bike (With A Cost) | NERO Show Ep. 106
item.itunes:title: ENVE Melee Review - A Smooth Race Bike (With A Cost) | NERO Show Ep. 106
item.description:
Today's Episode is supported by Peaks Challenge Falls Creek

Australia's Most Iconic One Day Cycling Event

Enter Now for 2025: https://bicyclenetwork.com.au


The Enve Melee remains one of the more unique bikes on the market, Jesse has had the opportunity to ride one and we go into detail about where this bike sits in the market.


Gran Fondo chaos in Australia with the last minute cancellation of the Bowral Classic, we ask one of the riders on the ground for an eye witness report on what happened.


Strength Training has become the buzz word in cycling YouTube, we answer some subscriber questions on the subject and Chris discusses his own personal experience.


Strength Training Video: https://youtu.be/jed4Bg1dyEI

UCI Gran Fondo Video: https://youtu.be/IX-Hkn27orI


Chapters

15:29 Melee: Positives

20:40 Groupset Thoughts

30:26 Melee Marketing

37:06 Melee: Who Is It For?

47:48 Fake UCI Race Bikes

51:30 Gran Fondo Chaos

item.title: Does Italy Make The Best Road Bikes? | NERO Show Ep. 104
item.itunes:title: Does Italy Make The Best Road Bikes? | NERO Show Ep. 104
item.description:
Today's episode is presented by PILLAR PERFORMANCE

Check out pillarperformance.shop and use code NERO at checkout for 15% off


The new TREK Madone faces some criticism as a review shows strange sizing and fit issues. Why do people think Italian bikes are better, even when they are made in the same factories as the main brands?


Cam Nicholls tests a rim brake bike vs a Disc brake bike and we do a full review of the Gravel World Championships.


Chapters

00:30 TREK Madone Issues Continue

26:11 Are Italian Bike Better?

43:43 Gravel World Champs

58:30 USA Gravel Riders No Show

1:27:53 Strava Pseudonym's

 @bicyclestation 

 @CamNicholls

Far Sport release a sub-1200g 50mm deep carbon wheelset which has us comparing this to other wheels in the market. Jesse deep dives internal and external rim depth, and we talk about which is best suited to each circumstance.

item.title: We Need To Talk About UCI Gran Fondo’s | NERO Show Ep. 101
item.itunes:title: We Need To Talk About UCI Gran Fondo’s | NERO Show Ep. 101
item.description:
Today's episode is presented by PILLAR PERFORMANCE

Check out pillarperformance.shop and use code NERO at checkout for 15% off


We rode Amy's Gran Fondo this weekend, qualify for the UCI Gran Fondo world championships. But we wanted to deep dive into gran fondos in 2024. They are most popular road cycling events we have, but are we doing them right?


Plenty of gear chat from what we saw as well as an adhoc Tavelo vs Cervelo debate. Finally 5 tips to make your road bike descending even better.


Chapters

00:30 Qualifying For UCI Gran Fondo World Champs

12:51 What's Happening To GF Courses?

21:01 Has The UCI Stuffed Up Gran Fondos?

24:35 What Did Other Riders Think?

33:58 How Much Did It Cost?

37:51 Was It Worth It?

46:21 Gear Chat From The Weekend

55:53 Tavelo vs Cervelo

1:10:01 New S5 Expectations

1:15:33 YouTube Round Up

1:19:18 5 Tips To Better Descending

item.itunes:title: NEW: Aero Bike Testing Ranks 11 Fast Road Bikes | The NERO Show Ep. 99
item.description:
Today's episode is presented by PILLAR PERFORMANCE

Check out pillarperformance.shop and use code NERO at checkout for 15% off


Cycling News drop a huge MEGA BIKE TEST with some of the biggest name bikes and brands going head to head in the wind tunnel. We pick through the article and discuss the outcomes.


 @roadcc  have been busy with tests of their own, comparing the pedal efficiency of an aero bike to a climbing bike. We look back at the week in Spain at the Vuelta and aster a number of great subscriber questions.

item.title: New Aero Bike With Relaxed Geometry… A Smart Choice? | The NERO Show Ep. 98
item.itunes:title: New Aero Bike With Relaxed Geometry… A Smart Choice? | The NERO Show Ep. 98
item.description:
Presented by Favero Assioma MX Pro Power Pedals

Power Meter Pedals for MTB XC, gravel and CX

Check Out https://cycling.favero.com/en/assiomapromx to find out more


Ribble have launched a new "All-Road" bike, we take a look at the specification and ask if this is the style of bike to replace the traditional endurance bike.


We discuss the end of your racing season in the northern hemisphere and ask which is a more suitable bike in 2024, the Factor Ostro VAM or Pinarello Dogma F.

item.title: Cam Nicholls and NorCal Cycling on Starting Indoor Training & Choosing Fastest Gear For Your Money
item.itunes:title: Cam Nicholls and NorCal Cycling on Starting Indoor Training & Choosing Fastest Gear For Your Money
item.description:
Special Episode featuring  @NorCalCycling  &  @CamNicholls 


These two guys have been doing comparison content on YouTube for a large part of the last decade, so we go into depth with what they have seen from frames, wheels and groupers. We dive into the road bike tyre width issue and NorCal builds the perfect crit bike for 2024.


Cam is keen to get back racing, so we look at what motivation he'll use, and we chat about indoor cycling set ups, how to make the most of the them. Huge thanks to Jeff and Cam for their time and let us know what else you would like to hear about from these guys.


Chapters

00:00 intro

00:18 Comparing Mainstream To Chinese Brands

12:52 Making Sense Of Tyre Width in 2024

25:02 NorCal Builds Perfect Crit Bike

36:26 Bike Fit and Position

40:47 Getting Back Into Racing

50:30 Indoor Cycling Tips

1:05:45 Future Of Lightweight Climbing Bikes

1:21:02 Where Did The Nero Show Come From?

1:28:42 Sponsorship and Credibility

item.title: The Women’s Tour de France Was Unbelievable | The NERO Show Ep. 97
item.itunes:title: The Women’s Tour de France Was Unbelievable | The NERO Show Ep. 97
item.description:
Get The Best Deals On Road & Gravel Bikes

Bike Exchange: www.bikeexchange.com/nero


Did we just watch the best Grand Tour of the year? Is it even a Grand Tour? One way or another we recap an extraordinary and controversial  @LeTourDeFrance  Femme, with the smallest winning margin in our lifetimes.


Pro cycling transfer season is well underway, we discuss which moves might make a difference and which bike brands need to do better.


The Olympics saw some big changes in training protocols for many athletes, we dive into the changes that might be useful for cyclists and Chris tries to up the Aero gains on the TCR.


Chapters

02:28 TDF Femme ReCap

13:00 Shocking Team Display

17:46 Timing Of TDF Femme

20:16 Pro Cycling Tech Spotted

44:43 Vuelta a España Predictions

item.title: New Chinese Carbon Bikes: Fast But Low Quality? | The NERO Show Ep. 96
item.itunes:title: New Chinese Carbon Bikes: Fast But Low Quality? | The NERO Show Ep. 96
item.description:
Get The Best Deals On Road & Gravel Bikes

Bike Exchange: www.bikeexchange.com/nero


We are called out by  @PeakTorque  as frauds, liars and hiding the truth in our assessment of the Chinese Super Bike. We hit back breaking down his assessment of the frame and how that compares to what Jesse's experience has been.


Campagnolo have released some exciting new banding while Colnago release a rim brake bike. Chris get's a chance to talk about his win at the Maters State Championships road race on the weekend, we talk about some of the specific training he was doing as well as the other bikes on show at the race.


Finally we have seen a resurgence of local cycling vlogs, we highlight some of the ones we have seen and what we love about the content.


Chapters

00:00 Intro

00:30 Peak Torque Calls Us Liars

03:30 Step By Step Reaction To Issues

30:54 Should We Stop Reviewing Bikes?

37:19 Campagnolo Branding

39:18 Colnago Rim Brake Bike

43:07 Bikes From The Weekends Races

51:44 Chris Wins State Masters Title

1:07:18 Bad Days Turn Into Good Days

1:14:11 Sydney Vloggers

item.itunes:title: My Bike Fit is Slow… What Can I Do? | The NERO Show Ep. 95
item.description:
Get The Best Deals On Road & Gravel Bikes

Bike Exchange: www.bikeexchange.com/nero


How can you get some free speed? Jesse rips into Chris' position at a weekend elite criterium and we search for a few solutions. The China bike wins its first race, but why is Jesse still corning like a Hubbard?


SRAM release a gravel groupset we are suppose to care about and the Olympics throws up some fantastic post up celebrations and heart breaking events.

item.title: My Rim Brake Bike is Slower than Modern Disc Bike | The NERO Show Ep. 94
item.itunes:title: My Rim Brake Bike is Slower than Modern Disc Bike | The NERO Show Ep. 94
item.description:
Get The Best Deals On Road & Gravel Bikes

Bike Exchange: www.bikeexchange.com/nero


Are modern bikes as bad as YouTube tells us they are? Jesse discusses his experience from moving from a top of the line rim brake bike to a Chinese road disc brake bike. We answer some YouTube comments about Rim brakes and look at what the future might look like.


Chris finally gets to talk about action cameras for bikes, Pogacar's old coach is getting slammed and Tom Pidcock continues to troll Jesse by winning things.


Chapters:

item.itunes:title: Clean Tour de France Riders Smashing Fastest Doped Climbers | The NERO Show Ep. 92
item.description:
Get The Best Deals On Road & Gravel Bikes

Check Out Nero on the Bike Exchange platform


The Tour de France hits the mountains and we check out some of the bike and tech choices of the pros, whilst some insane climbing performances has everyone wondering how this is even possible.


The Van Rysel RCR is reviewed, Coros delay their entry into the road bike cycling computer market, and we discuss the potential downsides to raising your FTP.

item.title: Guess Every Tour de France Bike in 2024 | The NERO Show Ep. 91
item.itunes:title: Guess Every Tour de France Bike in 2024 | The NERO Show Ep. 91
item.description:
Assioma PRO MX is the ultimate, rock-solid SPD® power meter pedal to improve your strength on the bike.


Check Out The Assioma Favero MX Power Meter Pedals with a special Nero Show link - https://bit.ly/4dFgpUE


Guess the bikes of the 2024 Tour de France, Jesse challenges Chris to name the bikes of the tour with just the silhouette. A huge week one of the Tour wrap up with new Specialised S-Works shoes spotted on Remco Evanapoel, Jasper Stuyven regrets the move to a Gen 8 TREK Madone, and Mark Cavansish breaks Eddy Merckx record .


A Chinese brand looks to enter the world tour and we discuss Jesse's own training for the rest of 2024.

item.itunes:title: Stiff Climbing vs Aero Bike for Criteriums | The NERO Show Ep. 85
item.description:

Peak Torque runs his eyes over the new SRAM Red identifying a few issues the shill reviewers (like ourselves) overlooked.


We take a broader look at where the two component brands are headed, discuss the new POC helmet which we have in studio and finally discuss racing a light climbing bike a local criterium.

item.description:
SUBSCRIBE On Youtube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t


If money was no object, what wheels would we buy. We do a deep dive into what a premium wheel set looks like in 2024 and of course compare main stream brands to their CCP comrades.


Aero bike v Climbing bike might be a 2016 GCN video title, but we go back down the rabbit hole, and we discuss the response to last weeks SRAM Red Launch.

item.description:
SRAM launch their new 2024 RED AXS groupset, we breakdown every component, take look at the package as a whole and think about where this sets SRAM up for the future.

item.itunes:title: Is a Gran Fondo a Race? & POC New Aero Road Helmet | The NERO Show Ep. 81
item.description:
Chris wins a bike race but Jesse isn't so sure it should be a race. We chat about HUGE carb loading and riding a 1x at a climbing event. POC release a new aero helmet that is set to change the helmet landscape and we discuss the importance of 'feel' in a bike review.

item.description:
Special episodes of the Nero Show featuring the best cycling tech YouTuber on the platform, Shane Miller aka  @gplama . Shane was kind enough to give us his time which gave us a chance to go into everything tech related in the cycling space.


This chat has everything from his opinion on up and coming cycling etch to an inside look into how he deals with brands and reviews for his channel.

item.title: Planning My First (Disc Brake) Road Bike Build | The NERO Show Ep. 77

item.description:
Endurance bikes have become the forgotten child in the road bike category, so we take a look at some of the best ones going around and ask why are they not hitting the mark.


Jesse is getting closer to his first road disc bike, we chat about the build options. SRAM's new groupset is close, what do we want to see.

Jesse is getting closer to his first road disc bike, we chat about the build options. SRAM's new groupset is close, what do we want to see.

item.title: Lanterne Rouge on his 11kg Weightloss, 5.5 w/kg FTP and Money in Pro-Cycling
item.itunes:title: Lanterne Rouge on his 11kg Weightloss, 5.5 w/kg FTP and Money in Pro-Cycling
item.description:
Special episode featuring Patrick Broe, the  @LanterneRougeCycling  from the  @LanterneRougeCyclingPodcast .


After the demise of  @gcn  + we discuss the potential issues for cycling to try and reach its fans, especially in Australia and the United States. LR discusses his own cycling, the Norwegian Training takeover, the  @hubermanlab  effect and we have some fun guessing cycling brands from their marketing bio's.


We hope you enjoy this one.


Chapters:

00:00 intro

00:30 Viewing Cycling Post GCN+

10:06 F1 driver bigger then cycling

15:51 YouTuber at the TDU

24:39 LR Fitness Vlogs

39:50 Can LR get to 5.5w/kg?

50:32 Norwegian Training Takeover

1:01:10 What Would LR Ride?

1:06:19 Guess The Cycling Brand?

1:18:01 The Nero Show in 2024

1:30:15 Selling W/KG Data To Teams

1:36:15 INEOS vs Jayco

1:42:14 Athlete Podcasts


The Lantern Rouge is the most popular pro cycling podcast and YouTube show, breaking down team rosters, Grand Tour stages and monuments. A huge thanks to Patrick for joining us today.


 @LanterneRougeCycling  - https://www.youtube.com/@LanterneRougeCycling

item.title: Canyon Aeroad vs Cervelo S5 & The Festive 500 is Toxic | The NERO Show Ep. 62
item.itunes:title: Canyon Aeroad vs Cervelo S5 & The Festive 500 is Toxic | The NERO Show Ep. 62
item.description:
A week of riding the 1x Cervelo super bike, Jesse wants answers, and we go into depth trying to work of the language that really makes sense to riders when it comes to a review.


Who should be riding a 1X system, Alex Dowsett starts a coaching company and we review our chat with Joe from  @ChinaCycling .


We hope you enjoy the show and a happy New Year to everyone!

item.title: Building Our Dream Aero Bike (How Should We Test It?) | The NERO Show Ep. 62
item.itunes:title: Building Our Dream Aero Bike (How Should We Test It?) | The NERO Show Ep. 62
item.description:
We are building the dream aero bike, but how should we test it? The Cervelo S5, SRAM X1, Reserve wheel set up is pure froth, but will it actually be a good bike to ride?


The UCI are banning more things, while we do a Pro Cycling wrap up discussing some new kit changes as well as Tadeg Pogacar's 2024 calendar.


Chapter Markers

00:30 New Bike Day

17:53 UCI Bans Stuff

32:18 2nd Hand Components

36:17 Pro Cycling Wrap-Up

The UCI are banning more things, while we do a Pro Cycling wrap up discussing some new kit changes as well as Tadeg Pogacar's 2024 calendar.

item.title: Cycling YouTubers on Their Dream Bikes, Anti-Doping and Training for 2024
item.itunes:title: Cycling YouTubers on Their Dream Bikes, Anti-Doping and Training for 2024
item.description:
Special Guest Episode ft. The Vegan Cyclist, Dylan Johnson & Nor Cal Cycling 

Training gains, favourite equipment, tyre width, the best aero gear, as well as some inside YouTube gossip, this is one of the biggest and best chats we have had on the channel, if nothing else, it will make you laugh. 

  If you are a fan of one of these guys, you'll love hearing them talking about topics you don't normally hear them discussing, but don't worry Dylan still nerds out on science, Tyler makes us laugh while Jeff maintains his class.  

Huge thanks to Jeff, Tyler and Dylan for making time and we'll be sure to do something like this again soon.

item.title: Pro Mechanic Ranks Top 5 Carbon Bikes He's Ridden
item.itunes:title: Pro Mechanic Ranks Top 5 Carbon Bikes He's Ridden
item.description:
A Pro Mechanic goes into detail about his favourite bikes from the last 3 years 

The Decathlon Van Rysel hits our screens and will be ridden by a pro team in 2024, does this mean Pro Cycling is now more accessible? 

We ask a Pro Mechanic what the b best and worst bikes he has ridden and worked on over the last 3 years are, and he gives us his home mechanic hot tips.

Sticking with RIM brakes, Creepy cycling stalkers, Pinarello vs Specialized, and the TRUTH behind the MAAP ambassador program. 

Stoked to have Jen come in and chat with us, she certainly challenged us on more than our opinion on disc vs rim.

item.title: Dylan Johnson on Becoming a Gravel Pro, Aero Gravel Bikes & Training 30h Per Week
item.itunes:title: Dylan Johnson on Becoming a Gravel Pro, Aero Gravel Bikes & Training 30h Per Week
item.description:
A super special episode of the Nero Show featuring  @DylanJohnsonCycling .   

We have a great chat about the Life Time GP from an athletes perspectives, what being a US marvel pro really means and how he went from YouTube to professional cyclist ... not the other way around.   

Big thanks to Dylan for taking the time to chat to us and we'll definitely have another chat soon.   

00:29 US EXPECTATIONS FOR WORLDS? 08:03 LIFETIME GP REALLY LIKE? 15:13 DYLAN KILLED GRAVEL? 17:48 IS GRAVEL SOFT? 23:16 AUSSIES IN LIFETIME GP 29:13 DOPING IN US GRAVEL 32:13 WHAT DOES US PRO EARN? 39:15 HOW DID YOU COME A PRO? 43:45 YOUTUBE TO GRAVEL PRO 47:43 HOW DO YOU FILM RACES? 52:14 WHAT DO YOU WATCH ON YOUTUBE? 58:55 FAST GRAVEL BIKES 1:02:00 FULL TIME GRAVEL  1:15:16 WHAT ARE YOU LISTENING 1:17:22 TRAINER ROAD 1:21:47 RULE 28 KIT

item.description:
Shimano recall their 11-speed cranks, all 2.5 million of them, whilst Jumbo and Quick Step discuss a potential merger. 

We discuss what you can and cant's say in a race, why do bike expo's still exist and that post event instrgam post, we have all done one.

item.itunes:title: Endurance Bikes VS Race Bikes and Justin Williams is Banned Again | The NERO Show Ep.50
item.description:
SUBSCRIBE On Youtube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t  

Happy 50th episode! 

This week we debate the relevance of endurance bikes, and if the newest versions of the genre will fix the slide. 

Justin Williams faces another suspension, whilst L39ION manage to keep their sponsors. 

The battle for the best Australian sprinter and are waxed chains mainstream.

item.title: The Vegan Cyclist on the Future of US Bike Racing
item.itunes:title: The Vegan Cyclist on the Future of US Bike Racing
item.description:
A special episode of the Nero Show featuring an in person chat with Tyler Pearce aka  @TheVeganCyclist .   

After a couple of weeks riding together we sat down and went over a range of topics including his love of road racing and what has pushed him away from the disciple. The rise of gravel, at both an amateur and elite level.   

We talk about Tylers own YouTube journey, the impossible route, his sponsors and his awkwardness with the Ultra Distance National Championships.   

Chapters 

00:19 FUTURE OF RACING IN THE USA 20:00 WHY CHOOSE GRAVEL? 29:00 GRAVEL ON YOUTUBE 36:00 THE VC YOUTUBE CHANNEL 44:12 RATING CANYON BIKES 55:24 HOW MUCH DO YOU MAKE FROM YT? 1:01:00 IMPOSSIBLE ROUTE 1:10:13 ULTRA DISTRANCE NATIONALS 1:30:14 YOUR FAMILY  

Check Out Tylers Channel :  @TheVeganCyclist   

SUBSCRIBE On Youtube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t  

The Nero Show is available on your favourite Podcast platform

item.title: Chris Raced the Alviso Crit with Norcal and Discussing The Remco Interview | The NERO Show Ep. 47
item.itunes:title: Chris Raced the Alviso Crit with Norcal and Discussing The Remco Interview | The NERO Show Ep. 47
item.description:
Huge week in cycling YouTube with one of the biggest interviews we have seen when Remco appeared on friend of the pod  @LanterneRougeCyclingPodcast . 

Even the big teams and brands were getting in on the action with INEOS and EF doing their best.   

Chris has been doing the YouTube rounds, riding with  @TheVeganCyclist  and  @NorCalCycling  

Check Out The Nero Jersey: https://nero-club.myshopify.com

Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:30 LRCP/Remco Interview 11:55 INEOS Hour Record Video 20:00 Alex Dowsett Snubs SL6 25:45 Called Out By Bonk Bros 26:46 What Is Nero? 32:47 New Nero Jersey 34:50 Riding With VC 44:22 Alviso Debut 49:35 Stealing Test Bike 52:12 Best Time Length To Ride 

 Content courtesy of  @LanterneRougeCyclingPodcast   @INEOSGrenadiers   @remcoev   @NorCalCycling

item.title: Are INEOS Too Soft on Pidcock & We Want a UCI Masters World Champs | The NERO Show Ep. 46
item.itunes:title: Are INEOS Too Soft on Pidcock & We Want a UCI Masters World Champs | The NERO Show Ep. 46
item.description:
Some of the big talking points from our chat with  @PeakTorque  are still playing on our mind, while YouTube proves it can still do a great independent review. 

Was the MTB world champs over shadowed by Leadville, and do INEOS need to get some control over Tom Pidcock.  Heat adaptation, saunas in your house and Chat GPT runs YouTube.  

Enjoy!

item.title: Peak Torque on Bike Marketing, Real World Aero Savings and Hookless Dangers
item.itunes:title: Peak Torque on Bike Marketing, Real World Aero Savings and Hookless Dangers
item.description:
Huge thanks to Alex from Peak Torque for spending some time with us answering all the questions we have been discussing on the show over the last few months. Alex has an experienced  and unique view of the bike industry, something we leant on in this discussion. 

 Check out Alex's Channel: https://www.youtube.com/ @PeakTorque

item.title: Best Moment in 2023 Tour de France and Our Dream Cycling Holiday | The NERO Show Ep. 44
item.itunes:title: Best Moment in 2023 Tour de France and Our Dream Cycling Holiday | The NERO Show Ep. 44
item.description:
Jonas Vingegaard's time trial is still making waves across the internet, but we discuss the reaction to not only the performance but the any criticism. Planning your next event, the training, the logistics and the way it's going to affect your day to day ... is it almost the best part.  Chris tries some Far Sports handle bars on his  @CHAPTER2Bikes  Koko frame with interesting results, which we discuss the explosion in cycle tourism.

Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:20 DEFENDING THAT TIME TRIAL 15:17 POST TOUR SUMMARY 21:24 PRE EVENT PLANNING 28:09 IMPORTANCE OF GOOD HANDLEBARS 40:39 CYCLE TOURISM TAKES OFF 44:31 BBUC FASHION BRAND 53:14 CHANGING COACHES 1:03:13 WHAT'S COMING UP

item.description:

Jesse unveils the new "Nero Suit", available for a limited time to buy. We look at the Specialized SL8 rumours as well as the UCI's updated Trans-Gender policy.

item.title: Are 30mm Tyres Slow & How Jesse Wins Races Without Training | The NERO Show Ep. 42
item.itunes:title: Are 30mm Tyres Slow & How Jesse Wins Races Without Training | The NERO Show Ep. 42
item.description:
How to cheat your next race, Jesse discusses how he races on the back of almost no training. Chris has a new bike to test with super wide tyres and he has drunk all the KoolAid.   

Team Jonas vs Team Yogi, whose side are you on in the final weeks of the tour and should we feel sorry for Mark Cavendish after he crashes out of the race.

item.title: Cam Nicholls Rates Every Bike He's Ridden & Training Issues as a 40 Year Old
item.itunes:title: Cam Nicholls Rates Every Bike He's Ridden & Training Issues as a 40 Year Old
item.description:
A special episode of the show as we are joined by cycling YouTube royalty,  @CamNicholls . In the episode we look back at Cam's full bike history and ask him to review them again with the benefit of hindsight. 

Which ones did he love and which ones maybe needed a second review.   We take a look at the recent Fibreglass controversy, what BMC is really saying him and whether he has any regrets on the platform. Cam also askes us for our opinion on the state of racing in Australia.  

Chapters 00:00 intro 00:20 Cam Reviews His Bikes 01:00 Giant TCR 3:22 Specialized Allez 06:00 Chapter 2 07:00 BMC Team Machine 09:20 Merida Reacto 10:00 Cannondales 12:32 Windspace 15:20 Elves Failth 17:38 Factor O2 20:43 Giant Propel 23:43 Seka Exceed  29:23 Polygon Helius 31:28 Fiberglass Steerer  46:15 Youtube Beef's  53:15 Anything He Regrets  56:09 Are BMC Paying You? 1:01:10 Training Over 40 1:15:00 What's Wrong With Racing In Australia?  

Footage Courtesy of  @CamNicholls   @GCPerformance18   @TraceVelo

item.title: Why Legion Didn't Win USA Nationals and Are Rapha Still Relevant? | The NERO Show Ep. 40
item.itunes:title: Why Legion Didn't Win USA Nationals and Are Rapha Still Relevant? | The NERO Show Ep. 40
item.description:
Euro Bike 2023 has brought some interesting things across our desk, they the big questions about what the equipment trends are for 2024 haven't really been answered. 

US Pro Nationals brought its usual amount of controversy, while bike brand Chapter 2 slashes its RRP overnight by 30%.

item.title: STOP the "Cheap Bike" Videos, Pre Tour de France Chat & What is a Crit Bike? | The NERO Show Ep. 39
item.itunes:title: STOP the "Cheap Bike" Videos, Pre Tour de France Chat & What is a Crit Bike? | The NERO Show Ep. 39

Cheap Chinese bike and groupset content is all the flavour on YouTube, but have we reached saturation. Criterium bikes have been around for a while, but have they changed and are they something you should consider? And will Peter Sagan win a stage at this years Tour de France?

item.itunes:title: Lanterne Rouge Podcast on Gravel Racing and Future of Pro Road Cycling
item.description:
A HUGE special guest episode today, as we are joined by Patrick and Benji from pro cyclings GOAT podcast,  @LanterneRougeCyclingPodcast    

We chat about everything from the brands with the most to win and lose at this years too, gravel racing in the US and how they built their podcast from the ground up.

item.title: SRAM Rival Conquers the Value Race Bike and New Sigma Bike Computer Fail | The NERO Show Ep. 38
item.itunes:title: SRAM Rival Conquers the Value Race Bike and New Sigma Bike Computer Fail | The NERO Show Ep. 38
item.description:
Value has been a dirty word in the bike industry for the last few years, but that seems like it might be changing.   

Chris Froome is back trolling the internet with his low carb eating habits, while we discuss the best places to live and ride in Australia.

item.title: Unbound is Boring, Our 2023 Dream Bike and Carbon Spokes Are Over-Rated | The NERO Show Ep. 37
item.itunes:title: Unbound is Boring, Our 2023 Dream Bike and Carbon Spokes Are Over-Rated | The NERO Show Ep. 37
item.description:
Massive week in cycling both on YouTube and out on the road.  @Cade_Media  starts a cycling podcast, as an Unbound content tsunami invades out homepage.   

Our comments with  @GCPerformance18   cause a bit of a stir, is it time for us to re-asses our attitude to the wider cycling community.  @Apple  come for  @GarminInt  in the bike computer space will we ask the biggest question in modern day cycling ... Are the days of the MAMIL numbered? 

 Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:21 Francis Cade Starts a Podcast 06:38 "Do It All" Bike Backflip? 11:12 Unbound Content Tsunami 16:00 The Death Of The MAMIL 21:13 Carbon Spokes 25:13 Apple Comes For Garmin 34:45 Obsessed By A Dogma 36:16 Growing Old As a Cyclist

item.title: Analysing The 12 Speed Groupset War + What Happened to the ENVE Road Bike? | The NERO Show Ep. 36
item.itunes:title: Analysing The 12 Speed Groupset War + What Happened to the ENVE Road Bike? | The NERO Show Ep. 36
item.description:
Campagnolo launch their newest groupset, and we are confused by not only the product, but the launch in general.    @davidarthur   @cyclingweekly  and  @bikeradar  do their first look videos, and beat  @gcn  to the punch.   

The product itself raises more questions then answers, but one thing is for sure, we are not sitting on the fence when it comes to our own opinions.   The release does have us questioning whether the groupset wars are at an end, while we discuss the Enve Melee.   

Thanks for  @nerocoaching  for joining us again this week and to  @GCPerformance18  for the additional footage.   Finally a note on the audio quality this week, which was sub-par. We have worked out what caused the issue and it won’t happen again.   

Chapters 00:00 intro 00:21 Campagnolo Launch Confusion 12:21 New Groupset Thoughts 22:00 Who Is To Blame For $8,200 Groupset Prices 28:00 Groupset Wars 32:41 Giro Wrap Up 37:46 What Happened to the Enve Melee 42:00 Why Bother Racing 48:15 Are Coaches Killing Racing?  

SUBSCRIBE On Youtube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t The Nero Show is available on your favourite Podcast platform  

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0UEODvANsVqrvSZV5TAqBv Amazon: https://music.amazon.com/podcasts/28558e66-2a6b-4ff5-a6bf-709f05b1ffe9

 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-nero-cycling-show-|-unfiltered-cycling-podcast/id1659229051

item.title: How China will make Western Cycling Brands Obsolete | The NERO Show Ep.33
item.itunes:title: How China will make Western Cycling Brands Obsolete | The NERO Show Ep.33
item.description:
China Cycling visits the Shanghai Bike show and it send YouTube into melt down, are we are the threshold of a new dawn for not only these brands, but the industry in general.   

Cycling kit was once a major topic of conversation, but these days it is nothing but background noise. Is it because we have reached saturation with what you can wear, or is something more sinister at play?  Thanks for supporting the channel and the show, please remember to share it with you friends and help us continue to grow.  

Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:21 New Age For Chinese Brands  24:44 Why Does The Scott Plasma Exist? 39:00 Cycling Kit Isn't Cool 50:00 Giro Crash Drama 59:00 Pro Team Kit Push Back  

Our friends on Youtube who we talk about today;   @ChinaCycling   @GCPerformance18   @CharlieCarbsandCycling   @NorCal  

SUBSCRIBE on YouTube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t The Nero Show is available on your favourite Podcast platform  Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0UEODvANsVqrvSZV5TAqBv Amazon: https://music.amazon.com/podcasts/28558e66-2a6b-4ff5-a6bf-709f05b1ffe9 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-nero-cycling-show-|-unfiltered-cycling-podcast/id1659229051

item.title: Doping in Pro Triathlon and The Fastest Growing Cycling YouTubers | The NERO Show Ep. 32
item.itunes:title: Doping in Pro Triathlon and The Fastest Growing Cycling YouTubers | The NERO Show Ep. 32
item.description:
Cycling Youtube channels that are blowing up at the moment, from  @TheCyclingTattooist  to  @cedrikbakkechristophersen  , will we discuss just how good guys like  @GCPerformance18  and Jeff from  @NorCalCycling  are in real life.  

The unavoidable doping controversy in the world of triathlon forced us to do some real life research, as we take a a very 'nero show' look at the upcoming Giro and how we will be using the  @LanterneRougeCyclingPodcast  as the way to follow it.   

Plus much more

item.description:

item.title: Gran Fondo Etiquette, Insane UAE Prize Money & Does Your Partner HATE Cycling? | The NERO Show Ep.27
item.itunes:title: Gran Fondo Etiquette, Insane UAE Prize Money & Does Your Partner HATE Cycling? | The NERO Show Ep.27
item.description:
The Nero show is an unfiltered cycling podcasts discussing the topics you are chatting about in your bunches and at the coffee stop. 

An event focused week this week, after a great weekend at the Snowy Classic here in Australia.  We have some fun discuss what we saw at the Fondo; aero socks, no saddle bag, missing frame numbers and not stopping at rest stops. 

The big question though is are we taking Fondo's too seriously.  

Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:21 Fondo Do's & Dont's 01:47 Fondo Kit lingering 03:47 Fondo Frame Number 05:06 Fondo Saddle Bag 07:23 Fondo Aero Socks 09:00 Fondo External Support 10:54 Are we taking it too seriously? 17:10 Is Cycling Hurting Your Relationship? 24:00 Big Money UAE 28:55 Do You Pig Root? 32:26 Wearing Pro Team Kits 40:26 Motivation To Ride 

SUBSCRIBE on Youtube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: GC Performance on Road Bike Prices, Tech and Trends
item.itunes:title: GC Performance on Road Bike Prices, Tech and Trends
item.description:
Cycling retail has never been in a more interesting place, so we go into depth with  @GCPerformance18  on everything from bike shop influence, how brands set prices, Chinese grouspets and what bikes are HOT in 2023.   

Huge thanks to Grant for joining us this week, and be sure to check out his channel.

This week we go into depth with what  @davidarthur  has been doing on his channel, as well as the most watched YouTube channel, you have probably not heard of.  Chris opens up about what is happening with him and Factor Bikes and Jess pushes back hard on what he thinks an influencer should be doing.

item.title: Vegan Cyclist on US Crit Chaos, Sponsorship & Getting SHREDDED | The NERO Show Ep. 22 ft. VC
item.itunes:title: Vegan Cyclist on US Crit Chaos, Sponsorship & Getting SHREDDED | The NERO Show Ep. 22 ft. VC
item.description:
This week Chris and Jesse are joined by one of the biggest and most successful cycling YouTubers,  @TheVeganCyclist  to discuss everything from local racing, YouTube sponsorships, US gravel racing and how to get a 6 pack as a cyclists. The Nero Show is an unfiltered Cycling Video Podcast discussing the subjects and themes you are discussing on your bunch rides. Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:19 Dropping a Category or Grade 14:17 How long should your bib shorts last? 22:20 Are you a cycling snob? 30:10 Can cyclists get 6 packs 39:20 What makes a YouTube sell out? 53:02 Thumbnail Cringe SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t The Nero Show is available on your favourite Podcast platform Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0UEODvANsVqrvSZV5TAqBv Amazon: https://music.amazon.com/podcasts/28558e66-2a6b-4ff5-a6bf-709f05b1ffe9 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-nero-cycling-show-|-unfiltered-cycling-podcast/id1659229051 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- INSTAGRAM: @chrismiller27 @nerocontinental TWITTER: @chrismiller @nerocontinental STRAVA: https://www.strava.com/athletes/186450 SERVICE & SUPPORT: Cycling Projects Racing Check Out Jesse's Coaching: https://www.nero.club/coaching

item.title: The Vegan Cyclist risks DEATH, buying used Bib Shorts and CyclingTips Re-Born | The NERO Show Ep. 21
item.itunes:title: The Vegan Cyclist risks DEATH, buying used Bib Shorts and CyclingTips Re-Born | The NERO Show Ep. 21
item.description:
The Nero Show is your WEEKLY cycling podcast that isn't afraid to discuss the issues you are talking about in your bunches and on your rides. In today's episode we talk about the VEGAN CYCLISTS recent gravel adventures, some new tech from SRAM and Canondale, the return of BI-Carb and how the PROs are using it, second hand cycling wear and CYCLING TIPS has a new home. item.title: Geraint THOMAS is Podcasting, Iñigo San Millán's Job and The Classified Hub | The NERO Show Ep. 18
item.itunes:title: Geraint THOMAS is Podcasting, Iñigo San Millán's Job and The Classified Hub | The NERO Show Ep. 18
item.description:
SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t Why are professional cyclists creating their own social media, is it a way of increasing salary's or are they trying to bypass the mainstream media. Lot's of content from UAE's "coach" Iñigo San Millán, but what's going on with his actual job at the team. Wearable tech, have we reached saturation point, and is there any point at all. Paid partnerships on YouTube, are creators actually making any money from the platform? The Classified Hub, have we finally seen some interesting tech in the cycling space. Chapters 00:00 Intro 00:19 Why Are Pro's Podcasting? 07:12 State Of Wearables 12:40 Iñigo San Millán's Actual Job at UAE 18:32 Kit Trends 2023 30:24 Nero Show Logo Fail 34:30 Making Money On YouTube 43:12 Classified Hub 47:13 Zwift World Champs 48:23 Sacred To Ride The Nero Show is available on your favourite Podcast platform Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0UEODvANsVqrvSZV5TAqBv Amazon: https://music.amazon.com/podcasts/28558e66-2a6b-4ff5-a6bf-709f05b1ffe9 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-nero-cycling-show-|-unfiltered-cycling-podcast/id1659229051 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- INSTAGRAM: @chrismiller27 @nerocontinental TWITTER: @chrismiller @nerocontinental STRAVA: https://www.strava.com/athletes/186450 SERVICE & SUPPORT: Cycling Projects Racing Check Out Jesse's Coaching: https://www.nero.club/coaching

item.title: Old vs New Bike videos are DEAD & Why are Cycling Podcasts Boring? | The Nero Show Ep. 17
item.itunes:title: Old vs New Bike videos are DEAD & Why are Cycling Podcasts Boring? | The Nero Show Ep. 17
item.description:
SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t The World Tour might be underway, but we can't help but be underwhelmed by the content that is being produced around it, so in traditional style we go deep into the issues. We also take a look at the trend to do the classic Modern Bike vs Old bike video, yes I know even I have done them. But is that video dead, do we need to just move on. item.description:
Given we have been late to the podcast game, we are uploading some of the earlier Nero Show Episodes recorded and uplaode on Youtube.

After a slow news week we are back with a vengeance, loads of top[ic to discuss and always we would love to hear from you. Let us know your thoughts on all the subjects and stay safe out there on the road.
